old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-40gy","title":"[security] broken Context::new() in OSCORE key handling","description":"rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs:386-451 (Context::new): references undefined variables (id_context_value, id_context, sender_state, restored, active, context_id, sender_seq). Incomplete struct init and key derivation (lines 414-436, 444-448). Affects master_secret/salt handling, key derivation via HKDF, ContextId, replay state for all OSCORE contexts. Critical for EDHOC-derived keys, nonce generation, replay protection. Touched in integration/oscore-recovery merge (42ba8eedd, one of last 20 commits). Also check edhoc.rs for related key export issues. Violates zeroize, constant-time, and RFC 8613 requirements.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T01:17:37.688312886Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T01:17:37.688312886Z"}
